widgets_values:
This example uses a depth controlnet for SDXL
(https://huggingface.co/xinsir/controlnet-depth-sdxl-1.0)

Other controlnets such as normals and tile can also work well
In order to reduce noticable seams at the edgest of different projections, normal_fade_power and normal_fade_min can be increased.
